question: Loan approval time
answer:
User asked: "How long does it take to get a loan approved?"

What chatbot answered: Asked for loan amount and collateral. Did NOT answer the question.

Why wrong: Wrong intent. User asked about approval time. Chatbot asked about opening a new loan.

Fix: Add new intent for LOAN_APPROVAL_TIME.

Correct answer:

"Loan approval typically takes 24 to 48 hours after you submit your application and collateral. For larger loans or complex structures, it may take 3 to 5 business days. Would you like me to help you start the loan application process?"

Advice: For "how long" questions, always give a specific time range (hours/days).

question: Supported blockchains for custody
answer:
User asked: "What blockchains do you support for custody? Do you support BNB Chain?"

What chatbot answered: Explained custody features. Did NOT answer the question.

Why wrong: Wrong intent. User asked about supported blockchains. Chatbot answered about custody features.

Fix: Add new intent for SUPPORTED_BLOCKCHAINS.

Correct answer:

*"We support 40+ blockchains for custody, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, BNB Chain, Polygon, Cardano, Polkadot, Avalanche, Cosmos, and many more. Yes, BNB Chain is fully supported. Would you like me to provide the complete list of supported blockchains?"*

Advice: For "what blockchains" questions, give a clear list and answer specific asset questions with "Yes" or "No."

question: Withdraw staking rewards time
answer:
User asked: "How long does it take to withdraw my staking rewards?"

What chatbot answered: Perfect answer — Wallets → Withdraw, 2FA, admin review 1 hour, unbonding times.

Why good: Clear, complete, accurate, with follow-up.

Fix: No changes needed. This is perfect.

Advice: This is the gold standard for withdrawal time questions.

question: OTC settlement on weekends or holidays
answer:
User asked: "Can OTC trades settle on weekends or holidays?"

What chatbot answered: "Yes — same day. T+0 for crypto, T+1 for fiat. We execute $5M+ trades every day."

Why good: Correct, clear, implies 24/7 operation.

Minor fix: Add explicit mention of weekends/holidays.

Correct answer:

*"Yes, OTC trades can settle on weekends and holidays. Crypto settlement is T+0 (1-4 hours) and operates 24/7. Fiat wire settlement is T+1, but may be delayed on bank holidays. Would you like a firm quote for your trade?"*

Advice: Always clarify if weekends/holidays are included when users ask.

question: Referral program
answer:
User asked: "Do you have a referral program? Can I earn rewards?"

What chatbot answered: Talked about staking page. Did NOT answer the question.

Why wrong: Wrong intent. User asked about referral program. Chatbot answered about staking.

Fix: Add new intent for REFERRAL_PROGRAM.

Correct answer:

"Not at this time, but we are planning to launch a referral program for institutional clients in Q4 2026. Would you like me to notify you when it becomes available?"

Advice: For "do you have" questions about features not yet available, be honest and offer future notification.

question: Interest charged on loan
answer:
User asked: "When is interest charged on my loan? Monthly? At the end?"

What chatbot answered: Perfect answer — daily accrual, monthly charge, Murabaha fixed cost, live in dashboard.

Why good: Clear, complete, accurate, with follow-up.

Fix: No changes needed. This is perfect.

Advice: This is the gold standard for interest timing questions.

question: Minimum amount to earn staking rewards
answer:
User asked: "Is there a minimum amount to start earning staking rewards?"

What chatbot answered: Asked which network to stake. Did NOT answer the question.

Why wrong: Wrong intent. User asked about minimum amount. Chatbot asked about staking new positions.

Fix: Add new intent for STAKING_MINIMUM.

Correct answer:

"Yes, the minimum to start earning staking rewards is $100,000 USD equivalent per network. For smaller amounts, we offer our Starter program from $3,000. Would you like me to explain the Starter program or calculate your potential rewards?"

Advice: For "minimum amount" questions, answer "Yes" or "No" first, then give the specific number.

question: Verify assets in custody
answer:
User asked: "How can I verify that my assets are really in custody?"

What chatbot answered: Explained custody features. Did NOT answer verification question.

Why wrong: Wrong intent. User asked about verification. Chatbot answered about custody features.

Fix: Add multiple verification methods.

Correct answer:

"You can verify your assets in several ways: (1) Truncated wallet addresses are visible in your dashboard for each asset, (2) We publish monthly proof of reserves reports with 215% coverage, (3) Full verification reports are available under NDA. Would you like me to help you verify your holdings?"

Advice: For "how to verify" questions, offer multiple methods (dashboard, reports, NDA).

question: Price matching from other exchanges
answer:
User asked: "Do you match better prices from other exchanges?"

What chatbot answered: Gave spread information. Did NOT answer about price matching.

Why wrong: User asked about matching competitor prices. Chatbot answered about spreads.

Fix: Add price matching policy.

Correct answer:

*"We don't automatically match prices, but our OTC desk sources quotes from 50+ liquidity providers to ensure competitive pricing. If you have a better quote from another exchange, please share it with our desk — we will review and may be able to match or improve it. Would you like me to connect you with our OTC desk?"*

Advice: For "do you match prices" questions, explain the policy clearly and offer a path for users to request a match.

question: Automatic logout after inactivity
answer:
User asked: "Does the platform log me out automatically after inactivity?"

What chatbot answered: Explained manual logout and "Sign Out All Sessions." Did NOT answer about automatic timeout.

Why wrong: User asked about automatic logout. Chatbot answered about manual logout.

Fix: Add automatic timeout information.

Correct answer:

"Yes, your session will time out after 30 minutes of inactivity. You will be automatically logged out for security reasons. You can also manually log out at any time. Would you like me to explain how to adjust your session settings?"

Advice: For "automatic logout" questions, give the specific timeout duration (30 minutes) and confirm it happens automatically.

📊 SUMMARY TABLE (Set 10)
Q#	Question	Rating	Main Fix
1	Loan approval time	❌ 2/10	Add LOAN_APPROVAL_TIME intent (24-48 hours)
2	Supported blockchains + BNB Chain	❌ 2/10	Add SUPPORTED_BLOCKCHAINS intent (40+ chains, BNB Chain yes)
3	Withdraw staking rewards time	✅ 10/10	Perfect — no changes
4	OTC settlement weekends/holidays	✅ 9/10	Minor: add explicit weekend/holiday mention
5	Referral program	❌ 2/10	Add REFERRAL_PROGRAM intent (not now, Q4 2026)
6	Interest charged on loan	✅ 10/10	Perfect — no changes
7	Minimum amount for staking rewards	❌ 2/10	Add STAKING_MINIMUM intent ($100k, Starter $3k)
8	Verify assets in custody	⚠️ 5/10	Add three verification methods
9	Price matching from other exchanges	⚠️ 5/10	Add price matching policy (review and possibly match)
10	Automatic logout after inactivity	⚠️ 5/10	Add 30-minute timeout
✅ NEW INTENTS NEEDED (from Set 10)
Intent	Variants
LOAN_APPROVAL_TIME	"how long for loan approval", "loan approval time", "loan processing time"
SUPPORTED_BLOCKCHAINS	"what blockchains do you support", "do you support BNB Chain", "supported chains for custody"
REFERRAL_PROGRAM	"referral program", "refer a friend", "earn rewards for referrals"
STAKING_MINIMUM	"minimum amount to earn staking rewards", "minimum stake for rewards", "staking rewards minimum"
📝 GOLDEN RULES FOR ABDUL (Based on Set 10)
Rule	Example
For "how long" questions	Give specific time range (24-48 hours, not "soon")
For "what blockchains" questions	Give a clear list, answer specific assets with "Yes/No"
For "do you have" questions about future features	Be honest (not now), offer future notification
For "minimum amount" questions	Answer "Yes/No" first, then give specific number
For "how to verify" questions	Offer multiple methods (dashboard, reports, NDA)
For "do you match prices" questions	Explain policy clearly, offer path to request match
For "automatic logout" questions	Give specific timeout duration (30 minutes)
